name: Yale Transaction Finders, Inc.
summary: Yale Transaction Finders, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated shell company with no operations, seeking to acquire one or more target businesses through purchase, merger, or stock exchange. Formerly known as Yacht Finders, Inc., the company changed its name in April 2022 following a change of control. It has limited capital and no specific industry or geographic focus for acquisitions.
